title: KHR_materials_retroreflection glTF Material Extension
description: glTF extension that adds a retroreflective microfacet lobe to metallic-roughness materials.

retroreflectionFactor.description: Linear blend between forward microfacet and retroreflective microfacet.
retroreflectionFactor.gltf_detailedDescription: Linear blend between the regular forward microfacet (0.0) and the retroreflective microfacet (1.0). This will be multiplied by the retroreflection texture when present.

retroreflectionTexture.description: A texture that defines the retroreflection factor in the red channel.
retroreflectionTexture.gltf_detailedDescription: A texture that defines a per-texel multiplier for retroreflectionFactor, stored in the red (R) channel with a linear transfer function. This will be multiplied by retroreflectionFactor. Values outside [0, 1] are clamped.
